title: XP from non-combat encounters (chests, shrines, secrets)
problem: XP is only awarded from killing monsters. Chests, shrines, and secret rooms grant no XP, making exploration feel unrewarded and deprioritized relative to combat grinding.

lineage.spawnReason: deferred mechanic: non-combat XP sources were explicitly excluded from the initial XP implementation

analysis: XP was only awarded via gainXp() calls in handleVictory (combat). Chest and shrine encounters existed but granted no XP, making exploration feel unrewarded. There is no 'Secret' EncounterType in the codebase — the feature scope covers chests and shrines only. Chest XP: floor-scaled, meaningful progression bonus for risk vs. loot trade-off. Shrine XP: smaller than chest, appropriate since shrines already give HP/MP/Stamina — XP is a bonus, not the primary reward.
implementation: GridScreen.tsx: (1) Chest handler: added const chestXp = Math.round(5 + floor * 3); gs.gainXp(chestXp) before gainScroll/openChest. Floor 1 = 8 XP, floor 5 = 20 XP, floor 10 = 35 XP. (2) Shrine handler: added const shrineXp = Math.round(3 + floor * 2); useGameStore.getState().gainXp(shrineXp) alongside HP/MP/Stamina restores. Shrine toast updated to show XP gain. Floor 1 = 5 XP, floor 5 = 13 XP, floor 10 = 23 XP.

decisions.decision: Chest XP = 5 + floor*3; Shrine XP = 3 + floor*2
decisions.rationale: Chest XP is higher because chests are rarer and have a loot opportunity cost (taking grid space from monster rooms). Shrine XP is smaller — shrines already provide strong recovery benefits.

decisions.decision: No 'Secret' encounter type — feature scoped to chest + shrine only
decisions.rationale: EncounterType.Secret does not exist in encounter.ts. Feature title was aspirational; actual implementation covers all non-combat encounter types that exist.

successCriteria: Opening a chest grants floor-scaled XP (8–35 XP by floor). Touching a shrine grants XP alongside HP/MP/Stamina restoration. XP appears in the XP bar immediately. Shrine toast shows XP amount.
knownLimitations: Chest XP is not shown in the LootScreen or loot log — it's granted silently before the screen transition
No 'Secret' room XP — EncounterType.Secret is not implemented in the encounter system
userGuide: Exploration rewards you with XP beyond combat. Chests grant ~8–35 XP based on floor depth. Shrines grant ~5–23 XP on top of their HP/MP/Stamina restoration. The shrine toast shows how much XP you earned.
implementationNotes: gainXp is called via useGameStore.getState() in the shrine handler (outside reactive context — consistent with chest handler pattern)
XP amounts are intentionally modest — they supplement but never replace combat XP as the primary leveling path

revisions.author: claude
revisions.reason: XP from chests and shrines implemented this session
